fixtures.reference_text: Cuttledoc is testing offline speech transcription on Apple Silicon.

provenance.source: Repository-authored text rendered locally with the macOS Samantha voice
provenance.license: MIT text; generated audio is not redistributed

materialization.command: say -v Samantha -o fixture.aiff 'Cuttledoc is testing offline speech transcription on Apple Silicon.'
materialization.notes: Pipeline smoke fixture only. Synthetic speech must not contribute to WER/CER selection.
